task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Apple MacBook Pro 16" (Electronics). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $2499.00 and wholesale is $1749.00. Product features: Laptop with M4 Pro/Max chip and Liquid Retina XDR display. Reference: https://www.apple.com/macbook-pro/

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Apple MacBook Pro 16". Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Apple MacBook Pro 16". Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
